case_title: AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING VS PUBLISHER GROUP WEST

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $710.19 FILED BY AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT PUBLISHER GROUP WEST ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-10-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
